scripts.build:cloudflare: prisma generate && npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/strip-sourcemaps.mjs && node scripts/prune-prisma-worker-wasm.mjs && node scripts/assert-wrangler-prisma-wasm.mjs
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build:cloudflare && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:wrangler:full: npm run build:cloudflare && npm run deploy:wrangler
scripts.deploy:cf: npm ci && npm run build:cloudflare && npm run deploy
scripts.preview:cloudflare: npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npx opennextjs-cloudflare preview
